description: Spacing scale for AI and code. Values in rem (16px root). Aligns with 4px base and dashboard page reference scale where overlapping. Use for padding, margin, gap, and layout spacing.

xs.description: 4px — Tight stacks (e.g. label to control), dense gaps.

xsPlus.description: 6px — Label-to-input gap (Lenovo Zero-Floor); between xs and sm.

sm.description: 8px — Icon–text gaps, compact internal control padding.

md.description: 12px — Input horizontal padding, medium gaps between related elements.

lg.description: 16px — Default field spacing, button internal padding references.

lgPlus.description: 20px — Default card internal padding (Lenovo Zero-Floor gap-5); between lg and xl.

2xl.description: 32px — Block separation within a page region.

2xlWide.description: 40px — Section padding desktop (Lenovo Zero-Floor gap-10); between 2xl and 3xl.
